eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 3:17 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 2:17 PM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: Colorado City- evacuated areas are still evacuated, any Colorado City areas not evacuated are now under pre evacuation west of interstate 25. This includes Hatchet Ranch west of interstate 25. Prepare to evacuate, winds make the fire unpredictable and move quickly. pre evac ccity and hatchet
